title: neottia fukuyamae
intro: Neottia fukuyamae, also known as the Japanese bee orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Japan, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottia fukuyamae include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory problems.
